/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,4 MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4,/X:PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/

/CAL: DEFENSE PROPOSITION 64 AND PC 1203,4 PETITIONS/NP/CTORD: DEFENSE PROPOSITION 64 PETITION FOR REDESIGNATION PER HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11361,8(F) IS GRANTED/X: THE COURT REDESIGNATES THE CONVICTION OF HS 11360TO A MISDEMEANOR FOR ALL PURPOSES,/CTORD:ANY RESTITUTION FINE PREVIOUSLY ORDERED THAT IS GREATER THAN $150 ISHEREBY REDUCED TO $150/CTORD: ANY BASEFINE PREVIOUSLY ORDERED THAT IS GREATER THAN $250 IS HEREBY REDUCED TO $250/X: WRITTEN ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,/CONTD: DEFENSE PC 1203,4 PETITION AND RECEIPT OF APD SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT/SUPP:06-20-19/CTORD:APDTO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/CTORD:SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT SHALL INCLUDE COPY OF UNDERLYING POLICE REPORT, TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF PROBATION IN SACRAMENTO COUNTY, COMPLIANCE WHILE ONPROBATION IN BOTH SACRAMENTO AND SAN FRANCISCO COUNTIES, RESTITUTION ORDERED AND PAID, AND APD RECOMMENDATION RE DEFENSE REQUESTED RELIEF/

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SACRAMENTO COUNTY TOSAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SACRAMENTO COUNTY TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/PROBEXP:06-13-17/
